zh.Hawkshead, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾霍可黑阿德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir George Sandys於大約1565年出生在英國時，他的父親Sir Myles Sandys46歲，母親Hester Clifton38歲。他與Willicent Goulesburn結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1665年享年101歲。

zh-hans.Hawkshead, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾霍可黑阿德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir George Sandys于大约1565年出生在英国时，他的父亲Sir Myles Sandys46岁，母亲Hester Clifton38岁。他与Willicent Goulesburn结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1665年享年101岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sandys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sands
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name from Middle English sandes ‘sands’, for someone who lived at or near a sandy place, or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Sands in Carlisle (Cumberland) or Sands Cottages in West Hoathly (Sussex). See Sand , of which Sands may sometimes be a plural form or a variant, with excrescent -s. Compare also Sandes and Sandys .

History: Comfort Sands, a revolutionary patriot born in 1748 at what is now Sands’ Point, Long Island, NY, was descended from James Sand(y)s (1622–95), who emigrated from Reading, Berkshire, England, to Plymouth, MA, and followed Anne Hutchinson to Westchester County, NY, and subsequently RI. In 1661 he settled on Block Island, RI.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir George Sandys was born about 1565, in England, his father, Sir Myles Sandys, was 46 and his mother, Hester Clifton, was 38. He married Willicent Goulesburn. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1665, at the age of 101.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir George Sandys est né environ 1565, à Angleterre, son père, Sir Myles Sandys, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Hester Clifton, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Willicent Goulesburn. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1665, à l’âge de 101 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir George Sandys um 1565 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Myles Sandys 46 und seine Mutter Hester Clifton 38. Er hat Willicent Goulesburn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1665 im Alter von 101 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George Sandys è nato il circa 1565 nel England, il suo padre, Sir Myles Sandys, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Hester Clifton, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Willicent Goulesburn. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1665, all'età di 101 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir George Sandysが約1565年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir Myles Sandysは46歳，母Hester Cliftonは38歳であった。Willicent Goulesburnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1665年に101歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir George Sandys(이)가 대략 1565년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Myles Sandys(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Hester Clifton(은)는 38세였다. 그는 Willicent Goulesburn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1665년 101세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George Sandys nasceu aproximadamente 1565, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Myles Sandys, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Hester Clifton, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Willicent Goulesburn. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1665, com 101 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir George Sandys родился около 1565 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Myles Sandys было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Hester Clifton, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Willicent Goulesburn. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1665 г. в возрасте 101 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir George Sandys nació aproximadamente 1565, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Myles Sandys, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Hester Clifton, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Willicent Goulesburn. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1665, a la edad de 101 años.
